titleStmt.title: SII 25.215: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 215. (A.R. No. 215 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: East, north and west walls of the Chaṇḍēśvara shrine in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This inscription is dated in the regnal year 7+1, Kumbha śu 3, Monday, Sōdi (Svāti)-nakshatra. The details of the date are irregular.

It records the grant of 4 mā kīḻaraiyē-mūṉṟu-mā-mukkāṇi, made after the purchase, as dēvadāṉa to provide for the food offerings to the deity Pallavaṉīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār installed as āśraya liṅga in the temple of the deity Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-ṉāyaṉār of Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉichchaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu by Pichchaṉ Pallavarāyaṉ alias Śōḻiyavaraiyaṉ of Paiyyūr in Paiyyūr-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī
tiripuvaṉacca
kkaravattikaḷ śrī
rācarācadevarkku yā
ṇṭu 7 Āvatiṉ Etirāmā
ṇṭu kumpanāyaṟṟu pū
rvva pakṣattu tritiyaiyum
tiṅkaḷkkiḻamaiyum pe
ṟṟa cotināḷ Irācenti
ra coḻavaḷanāṭṭu brahmade
śam Ucāttāṉamāṉa kera
ḷakulācaṉiccaturvvetimaṅka
lattu Uṭaiyār tiruvucāt
tāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyi
l Āticaṇṭeśvara tevar
cikattattu paiyyūrṉāṭ
ṭu paiyyuḻāṉ piccaṉ pal
lavarāyaṉāṉa coḻiyavarai
yaneṉ nirvārttu kuṭutta ni
lamāvatu Innāyaṉār ko
yilil Āciri
ya liṅkamāka
ṉāṉ Eḻuntaruḷi vi
tta Uṭaiyār palla
vaṉīśvaramuṭaiyaṉāya
ṉārkkut tiruvamutupaṭikku
m pūcaikkum ṉāṉ kuṭutta
nilamāvatu Uṭaiyār tiru
vucāttāṉamuṭaiyaṉāyaṉār
civaṉāmattu Iṟuppu nilat
til ṉāṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭai
yeṉāy Eṉṉutāyirunta
nilattu nāṉ Iṟṟaiṉāḷāl
tevatāṉamākak kuṭutta Iv
vūr vaṭamaruṅkil periyā
ṟṟaṅkālukku teṟkku Arai
maṉ kaṇṭattu vikkirama co
ḻa nallūr Ellaikkuk kiḻak
ku rūpāy 2 ¿ kiśakku 5 mūṉṟumā Innilam
Iraṇṭumāviṉ kiḻaraiye
muṉṟumāvuk
kum kiḻpāṟke
llai tirukkuṭamukkiṉārā
yaṇaṉ parameśvara paṭ
ṭaṉ nattatukku meṟkum
teṉpārkkellai nāṉ vi
lai koṇṭuṭaiyeṉāy Eṉ
kāṇi nilattukku
teṟkum melpārkkellai
ṉaṟc cey
nallūr Ellaikkuk kiḻakkum
ṅkalap periyāṟṟaṅ
ka teṟkum Āka Innāṉ
kellaik kuḷpaṭṭa nilam Iraṇ
ṭu māvi kīḻaraiye muṉṟumā
vum Iṟṟaiṉāḷāl Innāyaṉā
rkku kuṭutta Itaṉ teṟkku va
ḻi Eṉṟu per pecapappaṭṭa rūpāy
Orumā 1kāṇi kiḻakku (1/4) Innilam mākāṇikkī
ḻkālum Itaṉ kiḻārk
kellai tirukkuṭamukki nā
rāyaṇaṉ parame
śvarapaṭṭaṉ nilattuk
ku meṟkum teṉpār
kellai muṉṉūṟṟuvaṉ
peruvaḻiyil niṉṟum meṟ
kku nokkiṟa peruvaḻikku
vaṭakkum melpārkel
lai vikkirama coḻanallūr
ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapā
r kellai Iṟṟaiṉāḷil I
n nāyaṉārkku kuṭutta nilattu
kku teṟkkum Āka Icain
ta Innāṉkellaikkuṟpa
ṭṭa nila mākāṇikkiḻk kālu
m Itaṉ teṟkku Iṟṟai ṉā
ḷāl Innāyaṉārkku kuṭutta
cirāma mayakkal Eṉṟu per
pecappaṭṭa rūpāy mukkāṇi ¿ þ 1muntiri kiḻakku
mukkāl � Inni
lam Arai mā
Araikkāṇi mu
ntirikaikiḻ mukkāle
muṉṟumā mukkāṇik
kum kiḻpārkkellai In
nāyaṉār tevatāṉam tiruvā
ṇṭaḷantāṉ kuṉikkumRead as kuḻikkumpirāṉ
paṭṭālakapaṭṭaṉ kuḻipaṭi niṅka
lāṉa nilattukku meṟkkum
teṉpārkkellai Āṇṭar pi
cācaṉaṉ tevamulayār kā
ṇiyāṉa nilattukku vaṭakkum
melpārkkellai vikkira
ma coḻa nallūr Ellaikku
kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkel
lai muṉṉūṟṟuvaṉ peruva
ḻiyi niṉṟum meṟkku nok
kip pokiṟa peruvaḻi vāma
Āka Icain
ta perunāṉ
kellaikkuḷpaṭṭa
nilam Araimā A
raik kāṇi muntirikai
kiḻ mukkāle muṉṟu mā
mukkāṇiyum Āka rūpāy 4 mā
kiḻakku rūpāy mūṉṟumā � Innilam nālu
māviṉ kiḻaraiye muṉṟu
mā mukkāṇiyum Iṉṉāya
ṉārkku tevatāṉamāka nirvā
rttu cātaṉamum paṇṇi
kkuṭuttamaiyil Innila
n nilattāl vanta(ā)ppaṭi
maṭakku Eṉkāṇippaṟṟu
ṭaṉe kūṭṭikkoṇṭu kaṭamai
Iṟukka kaṭaveṉāṉamai
yil Innilam nāṉ Eḻu
ntaruḷuvitta Uṭaiyā
r pallavaṉiśvaramuṭaiyā
yaṉāyaṉār
kku Amutupa
ṭikkuṭalāka cantirā
titavaṟ tevatāṉa
māka cellakkaṭavatā
kavum Ippaṭi cammatit
tu nirvārttu cātaṉamumpa
ṇṇikkuṭutteṉ paiyyū
rṉāṭṭu paiyyuḻāṉ pi
ccaṉ pallavarāyaṉāṉa
coḻiya varaiyaṉeṉ I
vaieṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 25.215 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
